basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Rishikesh Project Research Scientist-I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Rishikesh (AIIMS Rishikesh)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Rishikesh (AIIMS Rishikesh) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Project Research Scientist-I Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their application via Email. The last date to send the application email is 25-07-2026.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: First Class Post Graduate Degree, including integrated PG Degrees; Second Class Post Graduate Degree, including PG Degrees with PhD; For Engineering/IT/CS - First Class Graduate Degree of Four Years.
qualification.details: Project Research Scientist - I (Non-Medical): First Class Post Graduate Degree, Including the integrated PG Degrees Second Class Post Graduate Degree, including PG Degrees with PhD For Engineering / IT / CS - First Class Graduate Degree of Four Years Experience: Preference will be given to those with post graduate degrees in Computer Science, M-tech, Statistics, or MPH and those having previous experience of working in a research project. Desirable Qualification: Proficiency in Computer handling and MS Word, Excel, Power Point, knowledge of statistical tools. Experience in data collection, data analyses, data handling and report writing. Excellent written and oral communication skills.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 56,000/- + HRA (1st & 2nd year), Rs. 56,000/- + 5% increments pm fixed + HRA (3rd year) Per Month (ICMR Guidline)
salary_details.details: Rs. 56,000/- + HRA as applicable (1st & 2nd year) Per Month Rs. 56,000/- + 5% increments pm fixed + HRA as applicable (3rd year) Per Month (ICMR Guideline)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Rishikesh Project Research Scientist-I Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 25-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Rishikesh Project Research Scientist-I Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 25-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Rishikesh Project Research Scientist-I Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Project Research Scientist-I post at AIIMS Rishikesh?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Project Research Scientist-I position at AIIMS Rishikesh is 25th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Research Scientist-I role?
faq.answer: Candidates need a First Class Post Graduate Degree, including integrated PG degrees, or a Second Class Post Graduate Degree with a PhD. For Engineering/IT/CS, a First Class Graduate Degree of Four Years is required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Project Research Scientist-I post is 35 years as of 1st February 2026.

faq.question: Q4. How will the candidates be selected for the Project Research Scientist-I position?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a written examination, an interview, or both, as decided by the institute.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Research Scientist-I post?
faq.answer: The salary is Rs. 56,000/- + HRA for the first and second years, and Rs. 56,000/- + 5% increments plus HRA for the third year, as per ICMR guidelines.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email to the specified address.

faq.question: Q7. How many vacancies are available for the Project Research Scientist-I post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Project Research Scientist-I (Non-Medical) post.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee has been mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What is the project name for which this recruitment is being done?
faq.answer: The project is titled 'Identification of the clinical phenotypes and comparison of the risk factors of thiamine deficiency in various regions of India'.

faq.question: Q10. Where is AIIMS Rishikesh located?
faq.answer: AIIMS Rishikesh is located in Rishikesh, Uttarakhand, with the pincode 249203.
